name: workjournal
description: Cloud-hosted development journal for AI coding agents and developers

interface.shortDescription: Capture decisions and search project history.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Workjournal through the Workjournal CLI. Capture completed work, search past decisions, review recent entries, and manage journals without adding an MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Log what we accomplished to Workjournal.
Search Workjournal for relevant past decisions.
